name: loader
description: Full-screen loading overlay modal with activity indicator, optional message, and backdrop.

props.name: visible
props.description: Controls whether the overlay modal is shown

props.name: message
props.description: Optional text message displayed below the activity indicator

props.name: backdrop
props.description: Whether to render a dimmed backdrop behind the loading container

examples.label: Example 1
examples.code:
<Loader visible={isSubmitting} message="Saving your changes…" />
// Without backdrop (spinner only, UI remains interactive)
<Loader visible={loading} backdrop={false} />

examples.label: Example 2
examples.code:
// File upload progress overlay
<Loader visible={isUploading} message="Uploading photo…" />

examples.label: Example 4
